description_long: This is a weathered caution sign mounted on a vertical metal pole. The sign face is rectangular, painted yellow with black text reading 'QUARANTINE AREA' and features a prominent biohazard symbol above the text. The sign surface shows signs of rust, dirt, and wear, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The pole is metallic, cylindrical, and appears galvanized, with a slightly rough, matte finish. The rear of the sign is plain and rusted, with visible mounting brackets securing it to the pole. This type of sign is typically used to warn of hazardous or restricted areas in urban or industrial environments.
description: A weathered yellow caution sign with a biohazard symbol and 'QUARANTINE AREA' text, mounted on a metal pole. The sign shows rust and dirt, indicating outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow sign face with the biohazard symbol and 'QUARANTINE AREA' text clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and the cylindrical metal pole, with the sign face barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rusted back of the sign and the mounting brackets attaching it to the pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the pole, with the sign face edge-on.
